ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., EMI TEST RECEIVER, SIGNAL ANALYZER) */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model_no" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "serial_no" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the equipment is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Calibration interval in months */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Maintenance interval in months */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was acquired */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "depreciation_rate" TEXT /* Depreciation rate for the equipment */,
  "asset_tag" TEXT /* Asset tag for the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the location is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number of the location */,
  "shelf_number" TEXT /* Shelf number of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration log */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the calibration */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number for the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* Parts replaced during the maintenance */,
  "labor_hours" TEXT /* Labor hours spent on the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the equipment */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was used */,
  "usage_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the usage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the usage */,
  "project_number" TEXT /* Project number associated with the usage */,
  "experiment_number" TEXT /* Experiment number associated with the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment for which the reminder is set */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date when the reminder is scheduled to be sent */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email address of the person who will receive the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., email, notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_reminders_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decommission_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decommission log */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being decommissioned */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was decommissioned */,
  "decommissioned_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who decommissioned the equipment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for decommissioning (e.g., obsolete, damaged) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the decommissioning */,
  "disposal_method" TEXT /* Method used for disposing of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decommission_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_no" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was released */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* Date when the model is scheduled to be discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being ordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date when the order is expected to be delivered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES equipment_suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_orders_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
